title.es: Triage Queue — Gestor de Cola de Prioridad

description.en: Build a terminal Python priority queue manager for an emergency unit: model patients with triage levels (1–3), implement enqueue, dequeue, peek, list_queue, and stats, build a CLI menu, and document your data-structure choice and concurrent-mutation strategy using only the Python standard library.
description.es: Construye un gestor de cola de prioridad en Python para terminal en una unidad de urgencias: modela pacientes con niveles de triaje (1–3), implementa enqueue, dequeue, peek, list_queue y stats, crea un menú CLI y documenta tu elección de estructura de datos y estrategia de mutación concurrente usando solo la biblioteca estándar de Python.

sharing.en: I just completed Triage Queue — Priority Queue Manager with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/triage-queue #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #python #datastructures #algorithms
